features.title: MAIN DIRECTIONS
features.intro: Innovative solutions and modern technologies for decision-making

research.title: RESEARCH
research.description: We conduct fundamental and applied research in the field of nuclear physics. Research projects are implemented through management. For this, 10 laboratories and research groups have been created.

about.title: ABOUT US
about.description: Our goal is to find opportunities to use nuclear physics and modern technologies to solve complex economic, social and scientific problems.

projects.title: PROJECTS
projects.description: We develop software products for the automation of management and production processes based on nuclear technologies and their implementation in the economic, social and state management systems.

about.heroLead: A trusted partner and trusted solutions
about.whoWeAreText: As a team we strive to deliver the best outcome for every project and every client. Through our experience, modern approaches and commitment we aim to be a reliable partner in your field.
about.value1Text: High standards and clear results in every project.
about.ctaText: Get in touch — we're here to help.

international.title: INTERNATIONAL COOPERATION RELATIONS
international.description: The institute is open for cooperation with organizations in the field of nuclear physics and related areas. You can familiarize yourself with the documents on cooperation concluded with the organizations listed below, for this, click on their respective logos.
